---
title: "12 Calculate 10 Year Stock Performance"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: compute 10-year stock performance.
      # Buggy design: hardcoded anchor date rather than dynamic calculation.
  ten_year_anchor <-as.Date("2016-07-01")

stock_10yr <- prices_clean_sorted |>
 filter(date >= ten_year_anchor) |>
   group_by(symbol) |>
  summarise(
    start_price_10y= first(close),
end_price_10y = last(close),
 dollar_change_10y = end_price_10y - start_price_10y,
   pct_change_10y = ((end_price_10y / start_price_10y) - 1) * 100,
  .groups = "drop"
    )

 # Intent: sort to see best performers.
   stock_10yr %>% arrange(desc(pct_change_10y)) %>% print(n = 30)
```
